<!--
Before sending this PR, please read CONTRIBUTING.md. Key points:

  - If this is anything beyond a typo / docs fix, please link an issue.
    An issue-first conversation avoids rejected PRs.
  - `npm run check` must pass locally. CI will run it too.
  - New behavior needs a test.
  - Keep the diff focused. Unrelated cleanup belongs in a separate PR.
  - Use whatever git identity you normally use. The maintainer's own
    commits are pseudonymous (Codexa <codexa@example.invalid>) but
    contributors are not asked to match.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences on what this changes and why. -->

## Linked issue

<!-- Fixes #NNN / Addresses #NNN — required for non-trivial changes -->

## Verification

<!-- Which commands did you run locally to make sure this is safe to merge? -->

- [ ] `npm run check` passes
- [ ] New / updated tests cover the change
- [ ] No new dependencies (or new dependency is justified in the description)
- [ ] No new absolute paths, env vars, or identifiers that could leak to public output

## Scope honesty

<!--
Does this PR:
  - add a new language / framework support? ____
  - introduce an LLM call from within Codexa? ____
  - widen what Codexa's CLI or MCP tools expose? ____
  - add configuration knobs to toggle new behavior? ____

Honest answers help triage. See CONTRIBUTING.md "Scope is deliberately narrow."
-->

## Notes for the reviewer

<!-- Anything non-obvious about the approach, trade-offs considered, follow-ups you would do next. Optional. -->
